potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall go back to waiting for the next customer after the payment is made.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When a customer begins a purchase, items are added one by one. The user can keep adding items until they finish.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow the user to add multiple items sequentially until the customer finishes their purchase.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall go back to waiting for the next customer after the payment is made.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not explicitly state that the system should wait for a new customer after payment. It only mentions going back to waiting.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall add items one by one when a customer begins a purchase.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is implied in the source text but not explicitly stated. It could be considered ambiguous.
